meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.1 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] A second ruby opener 《 inside a ruby reading ｜漢《か《ん》じ》 is ill-formed and raises nested-ruby (error, §9). Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor. Serialize canonicalises right-side ruby to the BARE form (the explicit ｜ is dropped) per ADR 0003 §6.1 / ADR 0002: ｜ is emitted only when a bare 《reading》 would re-parse to a different base; here every base is an all-kanji run whose preceding char is non-base (line start / 　 / の), so the bare form re-parses identically.
